mapper.select: SELECT d.id AS "departmentId", d.dept_name AS "departmentName", COALESCE(reg.cnt, 0) AS "registrations", COALESCE(vis.cnt, 0) AS "visits", COALESCE(exam.cnt, 0) AS "inspections", COALESCE(rx.cnt, 0) AS "prescriptions" FROM department d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT deptment_id AS dept_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM register WHERE visit_state NOT IN (4, 7) AND visit_date >= #{startDate} AND visit_date < #{endDate} GROUP BY deptment_id ) reg ON reg.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT r.deptment_id AS dept_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM medical_record mr JOIN register r ON r.id = mr.register_id WHERE r.visit_state NOT IN (4, 7) AND r.visit_date >= #{startDate} AND r.visit_date < #{endDate} GROUP BY r.deptment_id ) vis ON vis.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT r.deptment_id AS dept_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ( SELECT register_id FROM check_request UNION ALL SELECT register_id FROM inspection_request UNION ALL SELECT register_id FROM disposal_request ) e JOIN register r ON r.id = e.register_id WHERE r.visit_state NOT IN (4, 7) AND r.visit_date >= #{startDate} AND r.visit_date < #{endDate} GROUP BY r.deptment_id ) exam ON exam.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT r.deptment_id AS dept_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM prescription p JOIN register r ON r.id = p.register_id WHERE r.visit_state NOT IN (4, 7) AND r.visit_date >= #{startDate} AND r.visit_date < #{endDate} GROUP BY r.deptment_id ) rx ON rx.dept_id = d.id WHERE d.delmark = 0 ORDER BY "registrations" DESC, d.id

WITH days AS ( SELECT generate_series( #{startDate}::date, #{endDate}::date, '1 day'::interval )::date AS d ), reg AS ( SELECT visit_date::date AS d, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM register WHERE visit_state NOT IN (4, 7) AND visit_date::date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY visit_date::date ), charge AS ( SELECT pay_time::date AS d, COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS amt FROM expense_record WHERE status = 1 AND pay_time::date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY pay_time::date ) SELECT TO_CHAR(days.d, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "label", days.d AS "date", COALESCE(reg.cnt, 0) AS "registrations", COALESCE(charge.amt, 0) AS "charges", 0 AS "triagePending" FROM days LEFT JOIN reg ON reg.d = days.d LEFT JOIN charge ON charge.d = days.d ORDER BY days.d

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM department WHERE delmark = 0) AS "departments", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee WHERE delmark = 0 AND deptment_id BETWEEN 1 AND 20) AS "doctors", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drug_info WHERE status = 1) AS "drugs", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_triage_record) AS "aiTriageConsultations"
